leakage.notes: The July 16 prediction preceded the July 17 dismissal and relied on the June 30 dismissal request. Its searches for this Supreme Court docket returned no results and therefore did not surface the eventual disposition.

big_case.notes: The petition raised consequential statewide prison-emergency and qualified-immunity questions, but its fact-intensive, interlocutory posture and consensual dismissal sharply limited lasting significance.
